title:
Module 1
The Basics
subtitle: Course Overview and the Complete Basics to Starting AI Models
output_filename: Module 1 - The Basics/The AI Influencer Method.pdf

blocks.content: The AI Influencer Method is a system for building and monetizing social media pages using AI-generated personas. These personas look, act, and engage like real influencers but are entirely created and managed through artificial intelligence tools. This is not about catfishing or deception. This is a business model. You are building a brand, not pretending to be a real person.

The technology behind this method has reached a point where AI-generated images and videos are indistinguishable from real content when done correctly. The tools are accessible, the demand is proven, and the window for early movers is wide open. But this is a real business that requires real work, real patience, and real strategy.

items: How to create an AI influencer from scratch using professional tools
Which platforms to use and exactly how to grow on each one
The content pipeline that produces consistent, believable content
How to warm up accounts so they look human to algorithms
How to scale to multiple personas once your first page works
How to protect your accounts from bans and shadowbans
How to turn free followers into paying subscribers on Fanvue
No physical limitations on content output — generate 24/7
Consistent brand and persona across all content — the face never changes
Scalable to multiple personas simultaneously — one operator, many pages
Lower operating cost than managing real influencers
Full creative control over every aspect of the persona
You own the model — no creator dependency or contract issues
Content pipeline can be systematized and batched efficiently

right.content: Attention flows through a funnel. Free content creates interest. Interest creates followers. Followers convert to paying subscribers on Fanvue, a paid adult subscription platform where your AI persona monetizes through monthly subscriptions, pay-per-view content, custom requests, and tips.

items: Instagram / TikTok — Free content drives discovery and builds trust
Threads — Engagement engine that feeds Instagram growth
Link in Bio (link.me) — Bridge between free attention and paid conversion
Telegram — Pre-sell warming layer for hesitant followers
Fanvue — Paid adult subscription platform where revenue is captured (monthly subs, PPV, custom content, tips)

right.title: Critical Rule
right.content: Revenue comes from the funnel, not from posting. The system works as a whole — no single platform generates money on its own. Every piece of content exists to move someone one step closer to subscribing on Fanvue.

blocks.content: One of the advantages of the AI influencer model is the low barrier to entry. You do not need tens of thousands in capital to start. However, there are real costs you need to budget for. Going in underfunded leads to cutting corners, which leads to bans and wasted effort.

items: Dedicated iPhone (iPhone 13 or newer recommended — iPhones 13+ get pushed more by the algorithm): $150-$400 (used phones work fine)
Prepaid SIM card: $10-$30
Higgsfield (all-in-one AI tool for image and video generation): $50/month
Photo editing tool (Photopea): Free
Link in bio service (link.me): Free
Total minimum to start: approximately $200-$500

left.title: Why iPhone 13+?
left.content: iPhones 13 and newer are pushed more favorably by social media algorithms. The metadata and camera signatures from these devices signal authenticity to Instagram and TikTok. A used iPhone 13 is one of the best investments you can make for this business.

left.title: No VPN Needed
left.content: You do not need a VPN for this method. VPNs are unnecessary and can actually trigger suspicion on social media platforms. Post from your normal connection.

right.content: These are the only tools you need. Each one serves a specific function in the content pipeline. Keep it simple — do not overcomplicate your stack.

items: Seedream 4.5 — AI image generation (photorealistic output)
Nano Banana 2 — AI image generation (alternative model for variety)
Photopea — Image editing and artifact removal (free)
link.me — Link in bio funnel page (free)
Telegram — Pre-sell warming channel (free)
CapCut — Video editing (free)

right.title: Higgsfield — All-in-One Option
right.content: Higgsfield ($50/month) bundles AI image generation, video generation, and editing into a single platform. If you want one tool that does everything instead of juggling multiple services, this is the recommended option.

items: Instagram — Main traffic and brand hub. This is your most important platform
Threads — Engagement and discovery engine that feeds Instagram growth
Telegram — Pre-sell funnel that warms followers before they subscribe
Fanvue — Paid adult subscription platform for monetization
TikTok — Secondary reach and discovery (supplements Instagram)
Reddit — Niche viral exposure inside specific communities
Twitter/X — Brand presence and discovery through conversations

right.content: People start seeing actual results within 4-5 months of consistent posting and output. This is not a get-rich-quick scheme. The operators making serious money have put in months of daily work building their systems. If you are not willing to commit to consistent effort for at least 4-5 months, this is not for you.
What You Do NOT Need to Start

items: You do NOT need a $3,000 PC — cloud-based tools work for beginners
You do NOT need multiple phones — start with one persona, one device
You do NOT need a VPN — unnecessary and can trigger platform suspicion
You do NOT need a team — solo operators can run one page profitably
You do NOT need advanced video editing skills — simple clips outperform complex ones

right.title: Mindset
right.content: This is a real business. The people who fail are the ones who skip steps, rush the process, or expect results without work. The window for early movers is open now. But the window rewards builders, not browsers.

summary_points: The AI Influencer Method is a real business — expect to see actual results within 4-5 months of consistent posting
Revenue comes from the funnel: Social Media → link.me → Telegram → Fanvue (paid adult subscription platform)
Minimum startup cost is approximately $200-$500 — Higgsfield ($50/month) is the recommended all-in-one tool
iPhone 13 or newer recommended — these devices get pushed more by social media algorithms
Core tools: Seedream 4.5, Nano Banana 2, Photopea, link.me, Telegram, CapCut — no VPN needed
Instagram and Threads are mandatory primary platforms — TikTok, Reddit, and Twitter/X support the system
Start with one persona, master the system, then scale — do not skip steps or rush the process
